nodes.name: 麦鸡属
nodes.summary: 麦鸡属（Vanellus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联22种鸟类，如Long-toed lapwing、Blacksmith lapwing、距翅麦鸡等22种鸟类。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸻形目
nodes.summary: 鸻形目（Charadriiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联310种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、短腿鸻、白鞘嘴鸥等310种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸻科
nodes.summary: 鸻科（Charadriidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联54种鸟类，如灰斑鸻、Tawny-throated dotterel、Pied plover等54种鸟类。

nodes.name: 褐胸麦鸡
nodes.summary: 褐胸麦鸡（Vanellus superciliosus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Brown-chested lapwing。

nodes.name: Brown-chested lapwing
nodes.summary: The brown-chested lapwing, also brown-chested wattled plover, (Vanellus superciliosus) is a species of bird in the family Charadriidae. It resides year-round in a narrow strip of land from southwestern Nigeria to northeastern Democratic Republic of the Congo; its wintering range extends toward Lake Chad, Lake Victoria and northern Zambia. Diet V. superciliosus is a carnivorous bird feeding on insects, larvae, crickets, bugs, grasshoppers, etc. Their preferred habitat is grassy lands, open savannas or grounds of Mopane forests. References
